steps.title: Parallel lines → same slope
steps.content: Read slope of line $r$ directly from $7x - 4y = 8$: rearrange → $y = \frac{7}{4}x - 2$, so slope $= \frac{7}{4}$.

steps.title: Apply parallel rule
steps.content: Line $s$ is parallel to line $r$, so it has the same slope: $\frac{7}{4}$. That matches Choice D — $\frac{7}{4}$.
